brand.name: Hikaya
brand.description: All-in-one platform for Gulf creative professionals.

home.subheadline: Photographers, videographers, designers, and editors. Showcase your work, get hired, run your studio, and deliver to clients — without leaving the platform.

featured.title: Featured creators
featured.emptyBody: Hikaya's creator directory is just getting started. Be among the first to join and get discovered by Gulf clients.

home.valuePropsTitle: Everything you need to run a creative practice.

valueProps.portfolioBody: Photo-first layouts that put the work first. Masonry, full-width, or reels — your call.
valueProps.hireBody: Clients send you inquiries. You apply to public briefs. Conversations stay in one thread.
valueProps.studioBody: Bookings, contracts, quotes, invoices, payouts. Built for creative businesses.
valueProps.deliverBody: Client galleries with favorites, downloads, and watermark control. No more WeTransfer over WhatsApp.

ctaStrip.title: Ready to set up your home on Hikaya?

list.title: Job board

list.subtitle: Real briefs from real businesses. Filter by discipline and city; apply with a cover note and a proposed rate. Posts auto-expire after 30 days.

detail.title: Job brief
detail.appliedBody: The poster has been notified. You'll hear back through Hikaya messaging if shortlisted.
detail.signInBody: Briefs are open to anyone — but to send an application you need an account.

detail.notOpenBody: This brief is filled, expired, or closed. Browse the board for active briefs.
detail.ownerBody: Mark as filled when you've chosen a creator, or close it if the project is off.
detail.closeConfirm: Close this brief? Applicants won't be able to send new applications.

post.title: Post a brief
post.subtitle: Tell creatives what you need. The post stays open for 30 days; you can mark it as filled at any point.
post.descriptionHint: 40+ characters. Mood, deliverables, timing, anything that helps creatives self-select.
post.descriptionPlaceholder: We're launching a campaign in March and need a photographer for one day…
post.budgetOpenHint: Skip the budget and let creatives quote you. Often gets richer responses for ambiguous briefs.
post.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please review and try again.

apply.label: Apply to this brief

apply.coverNotePlaceholder: I shoot fashion editorials in Riyadh — happy to share a relevant gallery and discuss timing…

apply.errorNotCreator: Only creator accounts can apply. Add a creator profile to apply.
apply.errorClosed: This brief is no longer accepting applications.
apply.errorOwnJob: You can't apply to your own brief.

applications.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw this application? You can apply again as long as the brief is open.
applications.emptyHint: Once creatives apply, you'll review them here.

detail.archiveHint: Removes the product from your public storefront. Existing purchasers retain their download until their link's 7-day window.

form.descriptionHint: 20+ characters. What it is, who it's for, what makes it different.
form.statusHint: Draft is private. Active is public. Archived hides it.
form.priceHint: ZATCA VAT is added at checkout for KSA buyers.

form.compatibleSoftwareHint: Comma-separated tags. e.g. "Lightroom Classic, Lightroom Mobile".

legal.draftNotice: DRAFT -- subject to legal review. This document is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute legal advice.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: By accessing or using the Hikaya platform ("Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree, you may not use the Platform. Hikaya reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.section2Body: Users must be at least 18 years old or the age of majority in their jurisdiction. You agree to use the Platform only for lawful purposes. Prohibited activities include but are not limited to: misrepresentation of identity, harassment, uploading malicious content, circumventing Platform fees, or engaging in fraudulent transactions. Hikaya reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.
terms.section3Body: Creators are responsible for the accuracy of their profiles, the quality of their deliverables, and timely communication with clients. Clients are responsible for providing clear briefs, timely payments, and respectful communication. Both parties agree to use the Platform's built-in tools (messaging, contracts, quotes) for all project-related communication to maintain a complete record.
terms.section4Body: Creators retain full ownership of their original works unless explicitly transferred via a signed contract on the Platform. By uploading content to the Platform, you grant Hikaya a non-exclusive, worldwide license to display, distribute, and promote your content within the Platform and its marketing channels. Clients receive usage rights as specified in their individual contracts with creators.
terms.section5Body: In the event of a disagreement between a client and a creator, either party may file a dispute through the Platform's dispute resolution system. The responding party has 48 hours to submit their account. Hikaya's support team will review both sides and issue a resolution. Decisions may include partial or full refunds through the escrow system. For disputes that cannot be resolved through the Platform, the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia shall apply, and disputes shall be referred to the competent courts in Riyadh.
terms.section6Body: Hikaya acts as a marketplace connecting creative professionals with clients. We do not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of services offered. Hikaya is not a party to contracts between creators and clients. Our total liability shall not exceed the fees collected by Hikaya in connection with the relevant transaction.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body: This Privacy Policy explains how Hikaya ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) and applicable Gulf Cooperation Council regulations. By using the Platform, you consent to the practices described herein.
privacy.section2Body: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, phone number, profile information (bio, portfolio, location, services), and payment-related data. We also collect data automatically: IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, and interaction patterns. For creators, we process business-related data including booking history, revenue, and client interactions to provide analytics and platform services.
privacy.section3Body: Your data is used to: provide and improve the Platform; match creators with clients; process transactions and manage escrow payments; send booking reminders and service notifications; generate analytics dashboards; prevent fraud and ensure platform safety; comply with legal obligations under Saudi law including ZATCA tax reporting requirements.
privacy.section4Body: We use essential cookies for authentication, session management, and language preference. We use analytics cookies to understand how the Platform is used. Third-party services (Supabase for authentication, cloud storage for media) may set their own cookies. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings, though disabling essential cookies may impair Platform functionality.
privacy.section5Body: We use the following third-party services to operate the Platform: Supabase (authentication and database), cloud storage providers (media hosting), and payment processors for transaction handling. Each third-party service operates under its own privacy policy. We share only the minimum data necessary for these services to function. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section6Body: Under the PDPL, you have the right to: access your personal data; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention requirements); withdraw consent for optional data processing; receive your data in a portable format; lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority. To exercise these rights, contact us through your account settings or email privacy@hikaya.sa.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.section1Body: All payments on Hikaya are processed through our escrow system. When a client approves a quote and pays, the funds are held in escrow by Hikaya until the project is marked as delivered and the review window closes. This protects both parties: creators are guaranteed payment for completed work, and clients have recourse if deliverables are not met.
refund.section2Body: After a creator marks a project as delivered, the client has 72 hours to review the deliverables and either accept or raise a dispute. If no action is taken within 72 hours, the delivery is automatically accepted and funds are released to the creator's wallet. Once funds are released, they cannot be reclaimed through the Platform's refund process.
refund.section3Body: Refunds are processed through the Platform's dispute resolution system. Either party may file a dispute, and the responding party has 48 hours to submit their account. Based on the review, Hikaya may issue: no refund (if deliverables meet the agreed terms), a partial refund (if deliverables partially meet the terms), or a full refund (if no deliverables were provided or the creator was a no-show). Refund amounts are returned to the client's original payment method within 5-10 business days.
refund.section4Body: Cancellations before work begins: either party may cancel a confirmed booking. If the client cancels, any deposit paid may be subject to a cancellation fee as specified in the contract. If the creator cancels, any funds held in escrow are returned in full to the client. Cancellations during work: handled through the dispute system on a case-by-case basis, considering work completed and the terms of the signed contract.
refund.section5Body: Digital products (presets, LUTs, templates, guides) sold through the creator store are non-refundable once the download link has been accessed. If a product is defective or materially different from its description, the buyer may contact support within 7 days of purchase for a review. Refunds for digital products are issued at Hikaya's discretion.

feed.title: The Journal
feed.subtitle: Notes, behind-the-scenes, and craft from creatives on Hikaya.
feed.emptySubtitle: The Journal is waiting for its first story. Creatives on Hikaya share behind-the-scenes notes, craft insights, and project breakdowns here.

owner.title: Journal
owner.subtitle: Long-form notes from your practice. Drafts are private; publish when you're ready.
owner.emptySubtitle: Share your first behind-the-scenes story. Drafts are private until you publish.
owner.deleteConfirm: Delete this post? This cannot be undone.
owner.clientBody: You're signed in as a client. Sign in as a creator to write posts.

profile.linkToBlog: Read {count, plural, =1 {1 post} other {# posts}} on Journal →

studios.headline: Production studios across the Kingdom.

public.capacity: {count, plural, =1 {1 simultaneous session} other {# simultaneous sessions}}

studioSetup.title: Register your studio
studioSetup.headline: Tell us about
studioSetup.subtitle: This goes on your public studio page. You can edit any of it later — just get the basics in.
studioSetup.capacityHint: How many simultaneous sessions you can run.
studioSetup.specializationsHint: Pick the disciplines your studio supports.

errors.alreadyExists: You already have a studio profile.
errors.wrongRole: Only studio owners can create a studio profile.

public.title: Studios for rent
public.subtitle: Cyc walls, daylight lofts, podcast sets, rooftops. Book by the hour or the day — Hikaya creators only.
public.emptySubtitle: Studio spaces will appear here once hosts list them. Be the first to offer your space to Gulf creatives.
public.count: {count, plural, =0 {No studios listed} =1 {1 studio} other {# studios}}

detail.availabilityEmpty: No upcoming bookings on the books — you've got a clear runway.

book.title: Reserve this space
book.unavailable: That window is already booked. Try different dates.
book.needsSignIn: Sign in to book a space.
book.cannotBookOwn: You can't book your own space.
book.error: Couldn't confirm the booking. Please review and try again.
book.agreeRules: I agree to the house rules

owner.title: Your spaces
owner.subtitle: List your studio for rent. Set hourly and daily rates, mark dates, and let creators book the gear-ready bays you've built.
owner.emptySubtitle: List your first studio space for rent. Set hourly and daily rates, and let creators book directly.
owner.emptyHint: List your first studio — drafts are private until you publish.
owner.count: {count, plural, =0 {No spaces yet} =1 {1 space} other {# spaces}}

new.title: New space
new.subtitle: Sketch the basics now — you can publish to the public marketplace when you're ready.

edit.title: Edit space
edit.headline: Editing — {name}
edit.liveBody: This space is on the public marketplace and accepting bookings.
edit.draftBody: Drafts are private. Publish to put it on the marketplace.
edit.pausedBody: Hidden from the marketplace. Existing bookings stay on the calendar.

form.name: Space name
form.descriptionHint: 20+ characters. What's in the space, what makes it shoot-ready.
form.rateHint: Set at least one. Bookings round up to the next whole hour or day.
form.photosHint: One per line. First is the hero. 1–10 images.
form.statusHint: Draft is private. Live is public. Paused hides it.
form.houseRulesHint: Free-text rules shown to renters before booking.
form.addOnsHint: One per line: Name, Price (SAR). e.g. "Fog machine, 30"
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please review and try again.

bookings.title: Bookings on your spaces
bookings.subtitle: Every reservation made on the studios you've listed.
bookings.emptyHint: Publish a space and bookings will show up here.

rentals.title: Your space rentals
rentals.subtitle: Studios you've booked. Cancel up to the start time.
rentals.emptyHint: Browse the marketplace and book your first studio.
rentals.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? This can't be undone.

templates.title: Document templates
templates.headline: Reusable templates,
templates.subtitle: Save contract and quote templates to speed up your workflow. Load them into any new document with one click.
templates.count: {count, plural, =0 {No templates yet} =1 {1 template} other {# templates}}
templates.templateBodyHint: Use plain text or HTML. Variables like {clientName} can be replaced when loading.
templates.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
templates.emptyHint: Create your first template to speed up contracts and quotes.

availability.title: Availability settings
availability.headline: Set your availability,
availability.subtitle: Control when clients can reach you. Toggle your status and block specific dates when you're unavailable.
availability.statusSubtitle: This badge shows on your public profile so clients know if you're taking on new work.
availability.blockedDatesSubtitle: Add date ranges when you're unavailable for bookings.
